name: senddeploy

metadata.name: SendDeploy
metadata.summary: A CLI tool to upload files via SCP from Windows

documentation:
# SendDeploy

A CLI tool to upload files via SCP from Windows

# Usage

```bash
SendDeploy [-h] filename
```

# Development

## Prerequisites

```bash
python -m pip install --upgrade build
```

```bash
python -m pip install --upgrade twine
```

## Build package

```bash
python -m build
```

## Install from source

```bash
pip install -e .
```

## Upload package

```bash
python -m twine upload dist/*
```

documentation: Function to load entries from the JSON file

functions.name: SendDeploy.cli.save_entries
documentation: Function to save entries to the JSON file, including the last selected index

functions.name: SendDeploy.cli.clear_entries
documentation: Function to clear all saved entries

functions.name: SendDeploy.cli.remove_entry
documentation: Function to remove a specific entry by index

functions.name: SendDeploy.cli.create_ssh_client
documentation: Create an SSH client and connect to the server.

functions.name: SendDeploy.cli.progress
documentation: Function to create a progress bar and update it during the SCP transfer

functions.name: SendDeploy.cli.interactive_select
documentation: Function to display the interactive menu using curses

functions.name: SendDeploy.cli.add_new_entry
